---
title: false
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

<div class="home-hero">
  <div class="home-hero-overlay"></div>

  <div class="home-hero-content">
    <h1>What does abundance look like around the world?</h1>

    <p>
      The Green Yard explores food forests, edible landscapes, and the
      people creating abundance through plants and food in different places.
    </p>

    <div class="home-hero-buttons">
      <a class="hero-button hero-button-primary" href="videos.qmd">
        Explore the Tours
      </a>

      <a class="hero-button hero-button-secondary"
         href="https://www.youtube.com/@thegreenyardaz"
         target="_blank">
        ▶ Watch on YouTube
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="homepage-placeholder">

## Welcome to The Green Yard

We are rebuilding our website to share food forests, edible landscapes, growing
lessons, and stories of abundance from around the world.

More tours and stories are coming soon.

</div>
